name: Lovisa Holdings Limited
analysis: LOV has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 45% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$23.2500, stop A$20.5821, target A$30.2693 (2.63:1) — then trail it.
